category_sources: source_facts.description identifies LADSPA as Linux Audio Developer's Simple Plugin.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ladspa-sdk and the official LADSPA site labels the download as LADSPA SDK.
docs_sources: Official ladspa.org LADSPA SDK page documents and distributes the SDK.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official LADSPA sources provide a release tarball but no official source-control repository was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Linux audio plugin API.
source_facts.executables lists LADSPA SDK tools such as analyseplugin, applyplugin, and listplugins.
